texto: Women's courage is rather different from men's. The fact that women have to bring up children and look after husbands makes them braver at facing long-term issues, such as illness. Men are more immediately courageous. Lots of people are brave in battle.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mary Wesley sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “Women's courage is rather different from men's. The fact that women have to bring up children and…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a coragem, children, women, útil em momentos de women e men.
